text.title: Marketing Tool Stack Rationalization Failure Modes
text.summary: Antipatterns observed in real deployments of Marketing Tool Stack Rationalization. Each pairs symptom + sourced root-cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: 20-page audit report shipped; 6 months later 18 of 22 tools still active.
antipattern.root-cause: execution-checklist-required rule violated; no owners, no dates.
antipattern.fix: Re-issue with 30-day checklist; one row per Kill/Consolidate with named owner + deadline.

antipattern.symptom: Tool flagged 'high usage' by owner; admin audit shows 2 logins in 90 days.
antipattern.root-cause: usage-evidence rule skipped; owner answered from memory.
antipattern.fix: Pull admin-log evidence for every tool; require timestamp evidence per row.

antipattern.symptom: Marketing op uncovers 12 SSO-bypass tools 6 months post-audit; total opex $4k/mo.
antipattern.root-cause: full-inventory-first incomplete; SSO console not the only source.
antipattern.fix: Cross-reference SSO + finance bills + browser bookmarks + Slack integrations; merge into single inventory.
